after.description: ISO timestamp — only return jobs created after this date (e.g. "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z").

before.description: ISO timestamp — only return jobs created before this date (e.g. "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z").

id.description: A UUID string identifying this external data source.

schemas.description: Filter jobs by table schema names (e.g. ["users", "orders"]). Only returns jobs for these tables.
